name: Custom Cakes
desc: Each cake is made with real, high-quality ingredients and crafted to your specifications. Popular cake flavors and frosting options are listed below, but every cake can be customized to create the perfect cake for your celebration.

name: Cupcakes
desc: Beautiful cupcakes available in a wide variety of flavors and frostings, perfect for any occasion.

name: Chocolate Ganache
desc: A rich, flourless chocolate cake with a smooth ganache finish. This gluten-free "flat cake" is a decadent treat for chocolate lovers.

name: Lemon Squares
desc: Sweet and tangy lemon squares with a buttery crust. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Gourmet Cookies
desc: A delicious assortment of gourmet cookie flavors, from classic chocolate chip to specialty options like salted pecan caramel and Nutella. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Bundt Cakes
desc: Available in a variety of flavors, finished with a glaze topping.

name: Full Cheesecake
desc: Rich and creamy cheesecake available in a variety of flavors and crusts, with optional fruit toppings and glazes.

name: Mini Cheesecakes
desc: Bite-sized cheesecakes available in a variety of flavors and crust options. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Chocolate Covered Strawberries
desc: Fresh strawberries dipped in smooth chocolate, a gluten-free treat perfect for any celebration. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Mini Almond Cakes
desc: Delicate, almond-flavored mini cakes. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Cannoli
desc: Classic cannoli filled with chocolate chip cream and topped with crumbled pistachio. This item is sold by the dozen.

flavors: Chocolate Chip with Pistachio Crumbled Topping

name: Mousse Cups
desc: Light and airy mousse available in a variety of flavors, with gluten-free options available. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Pumpkin Squares
desc: Soft, spiced pumpkin squares perfect for fall gatherings. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Biscotti
desc: Crunchy biscotti available in a variety of flavors, dipped and drizzled with chocolate. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Pecan Pie
desc: A classic pecan pie with a buttery crust and rich, sweet filling.

name: Banana Bread Muffins
desc: Perfect to add to your breakfast, or enjoy as a snack. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Chocolate Covered Pretzel Rods
desc: Crunchy pretzel rods dipped in smooth chocolate. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Gluten Free Brownies
desc: Rich, fudgy brownies made without gluten. This item is sold by the dozen.

name: Toffee “Crack”
desc: A crunchy, buttery toffee treat that's hard to stop eating.

name: Red Velvet Cake Truffles
desc: Bite-sized red velvet cake truffles, rich and decadent. This item is sold by the dozen.
